title: Girls and Boys 3 Pairs Kids Gardening Gloves for Age 4-11, Non-Slip, Kids Gardening Work Gloves,Foam Rubber Coated Gardening and Work Gloves (Green+Blue+Yellow, Age(7-11))
features: High-Quality Material: Crafted with durable and breathable materials, these gloves are perfect for outdoor activities. The foam rubber coating provides excellent grip and protection against thorns, sharp objects, and dirt, ensuring your child's hands stay safe and clean.

Non-Slip Design: Our kids' gardening gloves feature a non-slip design that allows your little ones to firmly hold onto gardening tools, making it easier for them to dig, plant, and explore. The non-slip feature also ensures their safety and prevents accidents while working in the garden.

Comfortable Fit: These gloves are designed to provide a comfortable fit for children. The elastic wristband ensures a snug fit and prevents dirt from entering the gloves. The breathable material keeps their hands cool and dry even during extended gardening sessions.

Versatile Usage: These gloves are not only suitable for gardening but also for various other outdoor activities. Whether your child is helping you in the garden, doing DIY projects, or simply playing outside, these gloves offer excellent protection and grip.

Value Pack: Our set includes 3 pairs of gloves, providing enough options for your child to wear while gardening or engaging in other activities. The variety of colors and designs make them attractive for both boys and girls.
